name: Crossed Apocalypse
description:
Homage to one of my favorite extreme gore apoc comics. Begins in a midwestern diner.

V1.1: expanded crossed abilities, behaviors, groups, & territory depictions, deranged speech & expanded special crossed, apoc progression: stage 1,2,3 conditions, setting composition, {{user}} infection rules.

1.2: Extreme content & inspiration dialed in, expanded survivor groups, archetypes, crossed weaknesses.

1.3: Major Update: New leader, crossed condition updated, unique: Crossed Antennas, focused LLM rewards, +varied crossed dialogue.

Messages 1: Standard Start, 2: RPG Start, 3: Blank Page.

Image is a cover of one of the crossed comics.
creator: Grummux
